segments.caption: The video opens with sweeping aerial and ground-level shots of a luxurious train, the Belmond Andean Explorer, traversing rugged Andean landscapes, including mountainous terrain, grassy plains, and rocky valleys. The train, painted in dark blue and cream with arched windows, is shown crossing bridges and winding through scenic routes, with text overlays indicating it reaches 14,000 feet (4,328 meters). Inside, the train’s opulent interior features plush seating, elegant decor, and large windows offering panoramic views. A man, identified as Jeb Brooks from GreenerGrass.com, appears in a selfie-style shot from the train’s observation car, speaking to the camera with a mountainous backdrop. The scene transitions to an aerial view from an airplane window, showing lush green valleys and the sprawling city of Cusco nestled among hills, with text overlay confirming its elevation at 11,152 feet (3,400 meters). The video concludes with a ground-level view of Cusco’s historic rooftops and colonial architecture, including a prominent church dome, under a clear blue sky.

segments.caption: The video opens with a sweeping time-lapse of Cusco at dusk, showcasing its historic colonial architecture, cobblestone streets, and bustling plaza under a twilight sky, with the city's elevation of 11,152 feet (3,400 meters) displayed on screen. The scene transitions to a black title card marking 'Day 1: Cusco, Peru' with the same altitude information. The next sequence shows a daytime street view in Cusco, featuring a blue-shuttered building labeled 'MARKET KARILYN' and a man walking past. The camera then moves to a construction site with a white tower labeled 'WATCH' and a red bus passing by. The focus shifts to the Perurail train station, where a green sign with health prevention guidelines is visible, followed by a view of the platform with the Belmond Andean Explorer train arriving. A traveler with a suitcase walks toward the train, and the camera pans along the train’s dark blue and cream carriages, highlighting the 'BELMOND ANDEAN EXPLORER' branding. A small band performs on the platform, with musicians in traditional attire playing guitar, drums, and flute. The camera captures the train’s side, showing a pixelated Inca symbol and the name 'BELMOND' in large letters. A woman stands on the platform, holding a map, as the train remains stationary. The scene ends with two glasses of a frothy, reddish beverage on a table, followed by a man and a woman toasting with the drinks in front of the train, with the woman identified as Suzanne from GreenerGrass.com.

segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant scene at the Perurail Train Station in Cusco, where a group of Traditional Musicians in colorful striped shawls perform on the platform, playing instruments including a drum, guitar, and flute, with their equipment laid out in an open case. The camera then shifts to Jeb Brooks, who is seen smiling and speaking to the camera beside the Belmond Andean Explorer train, which features a distinctive Pixelated Inca Symbol on its side. The scene transitions to a lively cultural performance with dancers in traditional red and orange attire performing a dance routine on the platform, followed by a couple in modern attire dancing in a more casual style. Jeb Brooks and a woman, later identified as Suzanne, are shown wearing face masks and walking toward the train, boarding it with other passengers. Inside, the train’s elegant interior is revealed, with plush seating and decorative lighting, as passengers walk through the corridor. The camera follows them onto an open-air observation deck with ornate metal railings, where they enjoy the view. The segment concludes with Jeb Brooks and Suzanne smiling at the camera from inside the train, with the scenic Andean landscape visible through the windows.

segments.caption: The video opens with Jeb Brooks and Suzanne smiling at the camera on a train platform, both dressed casually—Jeb in a plaid shirt and Suzanne in a black top—suggesting a joyful travel moment. The scene transitions to a close-up of a champagne flute on a table beside a clock, indicating a celebratory or luxurious atmosphere. Jeb, now wearing sunglasses, speaks to the camera as the Belmond Andean Explorer train begins to move, revealing its elegant dark blue and cream carriages with arched windows. The train glides through a scenic landscape, passing by colorful buildings and winding roads alongside a highway, with lush green mountains and snow-capped peaks in the distance under a bright blue sky. The camera captures the train’s movement from an external perspective, showing it curving along the tracks near a road with a '400 Meters' sign. The video then shifts to the interior of the train, showcasing a luxurious cabin with a neatly made bed adorned with patterned pillows and a blue armchair, featuring warm lighting and elegant decor. The final frames highlight a spacious observation deck with ornate black iron railings and wooden flooring, offering panoramic views of the passing scenery, emphasizing the train’s opulent design and the breathtaking Andean environment.

segments.caption: The video begins with a smooth forward-moving shot down the elegant, cream-colored corridor of the Belmond Andean Explorer train, showcasing its ornate paneling and large windows revealing a passing green landscape. The camera then focuses on a sign labeled 'Coche – Car Totora,' which includes a description of the Uru people of Lake Titicaca and their traditional reed boats. A hand reaches out to touch the door frame as the camera enters a luxurious cabin. Inside, the cabin features a plush gray and cream upholstered seat, a small table, and a window with a red emergency handle. A woman with dark curly hair, wearing a floral blouse, smiles warmly at the camera, gesturing toward the cabin’s amenities. A man with a beard, wearing a plaid shirt, appears next, enthusiastically explaining the cabin’s features. The camera pans to show a neatly folded bed with a white duvet, a storage compartment with extra pillows labeled 'ALMOHADA / PILLOW' and 'ALMOHADA ADICIONAL / EXTRA PILLOW,' and a small safe with a keypad. The bathroom is revealed next, featuring a white toilet, a sink with chrome fixtures, a mirror, and a shelf with toiletries including a soap bar, a small bottle, and a gray pouch labeled 'H2O.' The overall atmosphere is one of refined comfort and attention to detail, emphasizing the train’s luxury and cultural touches.

segments.caption: The video begins with a view down the elegant Train Hallway of the Belmond Andean Explorer, featuring cream-colored paneling, decorative molding, and large windows, as a person in a blue shirt walks ahead. The scene transitions to an exterior shot of a white bus labeled 'ELDORADO' driving past a small station with a blue sign reading 'MULTISERVICIOS EM', set against a backdrop of green hills and a red-roofed building. The camera then shifts to the Observation Deck of the train, showcasing ornate black iron railings and a panoramic view of the mountainous landscape with lush green valleys and a clear blue sky. A man, identified as Jeb Brooks, appears in a plaid shirt, smiling and gesturing as he speaks, with on-screen text indicating an elevation of ~3,230 meters. The train is then shown from a distance, winding through the Andes at ~4,328 meters, with terraced fields and rocky hillsides visible. Inside, the Luxury Cabin Interior is revealed, featuring a plush gray sofa, colorful pillows, a glass-top coffee table, and a well-stocked bar with bottles of spirits. The camera pans to the Bathroom Amenities, highlighting a sink with a chrome faucet, a soap dispenser labeled 'JABON SOAP', and a hand lotion dispenser labeled 'CREMA DE MANOS', alongside a vase with pink lilies. The scene returns to the cabin, showing a cozy seating area with a glass coffee table atop a vintage suitcase, and a bar area with stools and decorative mirrors, all under warm lighting and large windows overlooking the passing scenery.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a vibrant orange lily arrangement in a terracotta vase, placed on a windowsill inside a moving train, with a blurred reflection of the flowers visible in the glass. The camera then pans to reveal a scenic view of a rushing river flanked by greenery and rocky banks, seen through the train’s large window, indicating the train is traveling through a mountainous landscape. The scene transitions to the interior of the Belmond Andean Explorer train, where Jeb Brooks, a man with a beard wearing a plaid shirt, stands in a luxurious cabin, gesturing as he speaks to the camera. The cabin features cream-colored paneling, elegant molding, a plush bed with striped pillows, two blue leather armchairs, and a dark wooden dresser. A woman, Suzanne, with dark curly hair and a floral blouse, appears excitedly, waving and gesturing toward the cabin’s features. Jeb points to a floor plan labeled 'Coche Totora 1826 Cabin 03' mounted on the wall, which shows the layout of the train car and indicates 'YOU ARE HERE' in the cabin. The camera then shows the bathroom, highlighting a sink with a decorative mirror, a shelf with neatly arranged toiletries including a gray pouch labeled 'H2O', and a small plant. The video concludes with Jeb and Suzanne playfully lying on the bed, raising their arms in celebration, as the train continues its journey through the scenic Andes.

segments.caption: The video begins with a luxurious interior view of a cabin on the Belmond Andean Explorer train, showcasing a cozy setup with a neatly made bed, two blue leather armchairs, a small table, and a dark wooden dresser. The camera pans to reveal a safe and a window with a red emergency exit sign, emphasizing the cabin’s safety features. A man, identified as Jeb Brooks, appears in the cabin, smiling and speaking directly to the camera, likely explaining the amenities. The scene transitions to a woman, Suzanne, opening a small window in the cabin door, revealing a scenic view of the Andean landscape outside. The camera then captures sweeping views of golden fields, rolling hills, and grazing sheep as the train moves through the countryside. Inside, the dining area is shown with a table set for two, featuring elegant brown leather chairs and a vase of flowers, suggesting a refined dining experience. A close-up of a lunch menu from the Belmond Andean Explorer lists gourmet dishes such as 'Giant corn and cheese' and 'Seared sea bass with muña-scented broad beans.' The video then shows the actual plated dishes, beautifully presented with garnishes and sauces, while the train continues its journey through the picturesque Andes. The final shots include a hillside with a large 'CHANITO' sign and a close-up of the seared sea bass dish, reinforcing the luxurious and scenic nature of the train journey.

The scene transitions to a blue train moving along tracks in a rural setting, followed by a wide shot of a soccer game on a grassy field surrounded by mountains and modest buildings. The camera then pans across a serene landscape featuring a small white church with a bell tower nestled in a green valley, with a donkey grazing nearby. The next scene shows a woman in a floral dress sitting at a wooden table outdoors, enjoying a dessert labeled 'Cara Cara orange in cardamom syrup and thyme, custard apple foam, and Thai granola,' followed by a close-up of a chocolate brownie with chestnuts. A donkey is seen walking near the table as the woman reaches for the dessert. The video then cuts to a man in a plaid shirt speaking inside a luxurious train cabin, with text overlay indicating an elevation of ~4,328 meters. The camera shifts to an exterior view of the train traveling through a vast, arid mountainous landscape, with snow-capped peaks in the distance. The train passes a small white chapel with a red-tiled roof, and the interior of the chapel is shown with colorful decorations and wooden pews. The final scene captures a lively outdoor market with vendors selling goods, set against a backdrop of rugged mountains under a clear blue sky.

segments.caption: The video opens with Suzanne standing in front of a small white chapel with a red-tiled roof and bell tower, set against a backdrop of rolling green hills and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. She is holding a knitted item and speaking to the camera. The scene transitions to an outdoor market with vendors and shoppers, set against a dramatic mountain range with snow-capped peaks, where on-screen text reveals her concern about altitude. The Belmond Andean Explorer train is then shown traveling through the rugged Andean landscape, with the text indicating they are at the highest point of the journey. The camera cuts to Suzanne and the Man in Plaid Shirt standing together, both wearing sunglasses, as they discuss their altitude experience—Suzanne notes she’s not feeling 100% but is managing, attributing it to prescribed medicine and some wine and gin & tonics. The man adds that he’s not ready to run a marathon but is generally okay. The video then shows Suzanne boarding the train, followed by sweeping views of the mountainous terrain, including misty peaks, grazing alpacas, and a winding river. The final shots capture the train tracks stretching into the distance, the sun setting behind the mountains, and a serene river flowing through the valley, emphasizing the vast, remote beauty of the Andes.

segments.caption: The video opens with a serene wide shot of a clear blue sky, where a small flock of birds flies in formation above a rugged mountain range, setting a tranquil tone. The scene transitions to a sweeping view from the train, showcasing a winding river cutting through golden grasslands with distant snow-capped peaks under a soft sunset glow. The camera then captures a train moving along a track through a valley, with a river flowing below and rolling hills in the background, bathed in warm golden light. A lone cyclist rides along a road parallel to the train tracks, silhouetted against the vast, sunlit landscape. The perspective shifts to a view from the train’s observation deck, framed by ornate iron railings, as the sun dips below the horizon, casting a vibrant orange and purple sky over a meandering river. The scene then moves to a quiet, abandoned white building in a field at dusk, followed by a close-up of a man and woman inside a luxurious train cabin, smiling and speaking to the camera. The on-screen text 'SMART CASUAL' appears, emphasizing the dress code. The couple shares a laugh, and the camera pans to reveal the elegant interior of the cabin, featuring plush seating, decorative pillows, a lamp with a blue shade, and a small table with pink flowers. A hand reaches in to adjust a pillow, and the camera focuses on two glasses of gin and tonic garnished with cucumber and lime, placed on a dark table, suggesting a relaxed, sophisticated atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of Jeb Brooks, a man with graying hair and a beard, wearing a dark jacket with a white-lined hood, speaking directly to the camera in an indoor setting with warm lighting and a white paneled door behind him. The scene quickly transitions to an expansive outdoor landscape at twilight, showcasing the Belmond Andean Explorer train snaking through a rugged, arid terrain with golden grasses and rolling hills. The camera pans across the landscape, capturing the train’s journey alongside a serene lake reflecting the soft hues of the setting sun. Aerial shots reveal the train’s full length as it curves through the valley, with distant mountains silhouetted against the sky. On-screen text appears, reading 'FOMO' and then 'FOMO > SLEEP,' emphasizing the allure of the journey. A woman, later identified as the Woman in Knit Beanie, appears in the landscape, wearing a colorful patterned beanie and a dark jacket, smiling at the camera with the lake and hills behind her. The video concludes with sweeping views of the lake at dusk, the train continuing its journey, and the sun dipping below the horizon, casting a golden glow over the entire scene.

segments.caption: The video opens with a breathtaking sunrise over a vast, arid landscape, where the Belmond Andean Explorer train snakes along a valley beside a calm lake, its cream and navy blue carriages glowing warmly under the golden light. The camera then shifts to a first-person perspective from the train, showing the tracks curving through rugged terrain with distant mountains under a clear blue sky. A brief interior shot reveals a luxurious dining table set with a vase of pink flowers, a plate of food, and a glass of champagne, suggesting an elegant meal experience. The view returns to the exterior, capturing the train winding through the high-altitude Andean countryside, with the tracks cutting through grassy hills and rocky outcrops. A lone worker in dark clothing is seen adjusting a railway switch near a red-and-white signal, emphasizing the remote and operational nature of the route. The train continues its journey, snaking along the contours of the hills, with expansive views of the lake and surrounding mountains. The camera captures the train from multiple angles—side, aerial, and from the observation deck—highlighting its graceful movement through the dramatic landscape. The final shots show the train ascending a steep hillside, with the vast lake and distant peaks visible below, under a brilliant blue sky, conveying a sense of adventure and isolation in the high Andes.

segments.caption: The video opens with sweeping aerial shots of the Belmond Andean Explorer train, a luxurious cream and navy blue train, snaking along a rugged, arid mountainous landscape under a clear blue sky. The train, labeled 'BELMOND ANDEAN EXPLORER,' curves gracefully along the terrain, with its locomotive marked 'PERURAIL' and the number '654' visible. The camera pans across the expansive Andean scenery, revealing vast, undulating hills, rocky outcrops, and a serene, deep-blue lake nestled in the valley below, likely Lake Titicaca. The sun shines brightly, casting sharp shadows and highlighting the golden-brown grasses and sparse vegetation. The perspective shifts to a first-person view from the train, looking down the tracks as they curve into the distance, emphasizing the journey’s isolation and grandeur. Inside the train, a beautifully set breakfast table is shown, featuring a white place mat with 'ANDEAN EXPLORER' printed on it, accompanied by a full breakfast spread: a fluffy vegetable omelette, fresh avocado slices, crispy bacon, toast, orange juice, coffee, and small bowls of jam and butter. The scene transitions back to exterior shots of the train moving through the high-altitude landscape, with the lake and distant snow-capped peaks visible in the background. The camera captures the train from various angles, including a side view as it rounds a bend, and a distant shot showing it as a small, elegant line against the vastness of the Andes. The final frames return to the interior, showing a close-up of the breakfast table with a hand reaching for a piece of bread, reinforcing the luxurious and serene experience of dining while traveling through this breathtaking terrain.

segments.caption: The video opens with a sweeping view of a rugged, arid landscape, characterized by rolling hills and sparse vegetation under a clear blue sky. A long train, identified as the Belmond Andean Explorer, snakes through the terrain, its cream and navy blue carriages curving along the tracks. The train moves steadily through the high-altitude Andean countryside, passing by small pools of water and rocky outcrops. As the train progresses, the camera captures wide-angle shots of the expansive plains, with distant snow-capped mountains forming a majestic backdrop. The landscape is dotted with grazing alpacas, their light brown and white coats contrasting with the dry grass. A man with graying hair and a beard, wearing a dark jacket with a white-lined hood, leans out of the train’s observation deck, gazing at the scenery. The train continues its journey, curving around hills and crossing open fields, with the tracks stretching into the horizon. The scene is serene and vast, emphasizing the isolation and natural beauty of the Andes. The camera occasionally focuses on the alpacas, showing them in small herds, calmly feeding. The train’s movement is smooth, and the landscape remains consistently arid and open, with no signs of human habitation beyond the tracks and occasional small structures. The sky remains clear and bright, suggesting a sunny day in the highlands.

segments.caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a vast, arid landscape where a small herd of vicuñas grazes peacefully under a clear blue sky, with distant snow-capped mountains forming a dramatic backdrop. The scene transitions to the interior of the Belmond Andean Explorer train, showcasing its elegant cream-colored hallway with decorative molding and large windows revealing the passing scenery. A man, identified as Jeb Brooks, appears in a close-up, wearing a dark jacket with a white-lined hood and a cap with a colorful patch, speaking directly to the camera with an enthusiastic expression. The camera then pans to a luxurious lounge car featuring plush gray sofas, a black grand piano, and ornate wall art, emphasizing the train’s opulence. Outside, the train continues through the rugged terrain, capturing a distant volcano emitting a plume of smoke against the mountain range. The landscape shifts to rocky canyons and arid hills, with the train’s exterior prominently displaying the name 'BELMOND ANDEAN EXPLORER' in silver lettering. The journey leads to the Cueva de Sumbay, marked by a black sign with white lettering reading 'CUEVAS DE SUMBAY ARTE RUPESTRE,' where a person in a dark jacket and jeans walks along a narrow rocky path, exploring ancient rock art. The video concludes with a close-up of the rock face, revealing faint petroglyphs, and a selfie-style shot of Jeb Brooks and a woman, Suzanne, smiling together against the backdrop of the canyon, with the woman wearing a black Columbia jacket and sunglasses perched on her head.

segments.caption: The video opens with sweeping aerial and ground-level shots of a rugged, arid Andean landscape, showcasing expansive rocky terrain, sparse vegetation, and towering snow-capped mountains under a clear blue sky. A train, identified as the Belmond Andean Explorer, is seen traversing the remote terrain, crossing a green metal bridge over a deep ravine and snaking along narrow tracks carved through rocky hillsides. The camera alternates between wide panoramic views of the desert-like valleys and close-ups of the train tracks, emphasizing the isolation and grandeur of the environment. A majestic volcano dominates the horizon in several frames, while a bird of prey soars across the sky, adding a sense of wildness. The perspective shifts to a first-person view from the front of the train, looking down the tracks as they curve through the landscape. A herd of vicuñas grazes peacefully in the distance, highlighting the region’s wildlife. The scene transitions to the interior of the train, where a man with a beard and a cap featuring a British flag patch speaks directly to the camera, standing in the doorway with the tracks and desert stretching behind him. The final shot reveals the luxurious lounge car interior, featuring elegant cream paneling, a bar with bottles, patterned cushions, and a large window framing the distant snow-capped peaks, blending opulence with the raw beauty of the Andes.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Man in Cap and Sunglasses, wearing a dark cap with a British flag patch and a plaid shirt, speaking directly to the camera from the doorway of the Belmond Andean Explorer train, with the arid desert landscape and train tracks stretching into the distance behind him. The camera then pans to show the train moving along the tracks, revealing a vast, dry terrain with sparse vegetation, distant mountains, and a white van parked near a small station. As the train continues, a group of vicuñas is seen grazing near the tracks, adding a touch of wildlife to the scene. The perspective shifts to the interior of the train, where the Man in Cap and Sunglasses is seated at a dining table, holding a glass of red wine and commenting on his first experience with Peruvian wine from a vineyard south of Lima. A close-up of the wine bottle reveals it is a Tacama Selección Especial Tannat. The lunch menu from the Belmond Andean Explorer is shown, listing gourmet dishes such as red pepper nikkei tiradito, potato cream with confit potatoes and parmesan foam, and sucking pig with apple, vanilla, and mustard sauce. The camera captures the beautifully plated dishes, including the red pepper nikkei tiradito and the potato cream dish, as the train passes through lush green vineyards and terraced fields nestled in the Andes. The journey continues with sweeping aerial views of the landscape, showcasing the contrast between the arid hills and the cultivated vineyards, before returning to the dining car where the sucking pig dish is presented with caramelized turnips and mustard sauce, highlighting the luxurious dining experience aboard the train.

The video captures moments of joy, travel, and candid interactions, with changing backdrops from rugged landscapes to cozy train interiors, all under bright, natural lighting that emphasizes the golden hour and clear skies.
